SpTU 5, 276 [Sign-writing exercise][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
Column i
(start of column missing)
o i 1'o 1'

[...] BAD1

o i 2'2'

[...] BAD

o i 3'3'

[...] ⸢BAD⸣

o i 4'4'

[...] ⸢BAD⸣

(end column missing)
Column ii
o ii 1o ii 1

DIŠ BAD

o ii 22

DIŠ BAD

o ii 33

DIŠ BAD

o ii 44

DIŠ BAD

o ii 55

DIŠ BAD

o ii 66

DIŠ BAD

o ii 77

DIŠ BAD2

o ii 88

DIŠ BAD

o ii 99

DIŠ BAD

o ii 1010

DIŠ [...]

o ii 1111

⸢DIŠ⸣ [...]

(end column missing)

1Or instead of BAD: AŠ U throughout the text.

2The BAD-sign on lines 6 and 7 ends in a double Winkelhaken.
